mapper.select: select p.* from sys_post p left join sys_user_post up on up.post_id = p.post_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = up.user_id where u.user_id = #{userId}

select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time FROM sys_user u join sys_user_post sup on sup.user_id = u.user_id join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = sup.post_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time FROM sys_user u join sys_user_post sup on sup.user_id = u.user_id join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = sup.post_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
